schemas.name: core
schemas.description: Tenant, identity, governance, configuration, and shared master data

schemas.name: project
schemas.description: Project master data, scorecards, workflows, anomalies, milestones, budgets, recommendations

schemas.name: content
schemas.description: Artifacts, extraction, classification, documents, packages, standards corpus, branding

schemas.name: integration
schemas.description: Mappings, IoT, webhooks, external integration settings and deliveries

schemas.name: ops
schemas.description: Audit, AI logs, retention, export/deletion, job queue, notifications, analytics, observability

checkConstraints.name: CK_AccessInvite_DefaultAccessLevel
checkConstraints.expression: DefaultAccessLevel IS NULL OR DefaultAccessLevel IN ('readOnly')

checkConstraints.name: CK_AccessGrant_AccessLevel
checkConstraints.expression: AccessLevel IS NULL OR AccessLevel IN ('readOnly','elevated')

checkConstraints.name: CK_AccessGrant_SensitivityApprovalRequirement
checkConstraints.expression: SensitivityApprovalRequirement IS NULL OR SensitivityApprovalRequirement IN ('single','dual')

checkConstraints.name: CK_BusinessCalendar_ScopeId
checkConstraints.expression: (ScopeType = 'tenant' AND ScopeId IS NULL) OR (ScopeType = 'project' AND ScopeId IS NOT NULL)

checkConstraints.name: CK_RegionalProfile_ClimateZone
checkConstraints.expression: ClimateZoneCode IS NULL OR ClimateZoneCode IN ('IN-Composite','IN-HotDry','IN-WarmHumid','IN-Temperate','IN-Cold')

checkConstraints.name: CK_Project_ClimateZoneCode
checkConstraints.expression: ClimateZoneCode IS NULL OR ClimateZoneCode IN ('IN-Composite','IN-HotDry','IN-WarmHumid','IN-Temperate','IN-Cold')

checkConstraints.name: CK_Project_WorkflowState
checkConstraints.expression: WorkflowState IN ('Project Intake','Pre-assessment','Evidence Collection','Simulation Orchestration','Documentation/Narratives/Calculators','Packaging for Submission','Manual Portal Upload','Auditor Q&A/Clarifications','Resubmission','Certified/Closed')

checkConstraints.name: CK_Project_Dates
checkConstraints.expression: StartDate IS NULL OR EndDate IS NULL OR StartDate <= EndDate

checkConstraints.name: CK_ProjectStakeholder_Group
checkConstraints.expression: StakeholderGroup IN ('Sustainability Consultant','Owner','Architect','MEP','PMC','Landscape Consultant','Construction Team','Procurement Team','External Auditor','Admin')

checkConstraints.name: CK_ProjectTransferRequest_ApprovalStatus
checkConstraints.expression: ApprovalStatus IS NULL OR ApprovalStatus IN ('pending','approved','rejected')

checkConstraints.name: CK_ProjectTransferRequest_ApprovalCounts
checkConstraints.expression: RequiredApprovalCount IS NULL OR (RequiredApprovalCount >= 1 AND ApprovalCount IS NOT NULL AND ApprovalCount >= 0 AND ApprovalCount <= RequiredApprovalCount)

checkConstraints.name: CK_PreAssessmentRun_Confidence
checkConstraints.expression: Confidence IS NULL OR (Confidence >= 0 AND Confidence <= 1)

checkConstraints.name: CK_SourceCitation_LicenseStatus
checkConstraints.expression: LicenseStatus IS NULL OR LicenseStatus IN ('licensed','permittedPublic','internal')

checkConstraints.name: CK_EvidenceTask_DueDayOfMonth
checkConstraints.expression: DueDayOfMonth IS NULL OR DueDayOfMonth BETWEEN 1 AND 28

checkConstraints.name: CK_SimulationJob_ResultPackageValidationStatus
checkConstraints.expression: ResultPackageValidationStatus IS NULL OR ResultPackageValidationStatus IN ('pending','valid','invalid','manualReview')

checkConstraints.name: CK_Milestone_Dates
checkConstraints.expression: ActualDate IS NULL OR ActualDate >= PlannedDate

checkConstraints.name: CK_RecommendationBackingAnalysis_OneReference
checkConstraints.expression: (CASE WHEN SimulationJobId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN DocumentArtifactId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN CarbonResultId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1

checkConstraints.name: CK_CorrectiveActionCitation_LicenseStatus
checkConstraints.expression: LicenseStatus IS NULL OR LicenseStatus IN ('licensed','permittedPublic','internal')

checkConstraints.name: CK_Artifact_SourceSystem
checkConstraints.expression: SourceSystem IS NULL OR SourceSystem IN ('accManual','autodeskAcc','internalFileShare','email','spreadsheetUpload','cadUpload','bimUpload','simulationResult','equest','revit','other')

checkConstraints.name: CK_ClassificationResult_PrecisionEstimate
checkConstraints.expression: PrecisionEstimate IS NULL OR (PrecisionEstimate >= 0 AND PrecisionEstimate <= 1)

checkConstraints.name: CK_ClassificationResult_RecallEstimate
checkConstraints.expression: RecallEstimate IS NULL OR (RecallEstimate >= 0 AND RecallEstimate <= 1)

checkConstraints.name: CK_SubmissionPackageArtifact_OneSource
checkConstraints.expression: (CASE WHEN ArtifactId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN DocumentArtifactId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1

checkConstraints.name: CK_StandardCorpusItem_LicenseDates
checkConstraints.expression: LicenseEndDate IS NULL OR LicenseStartDate <= LicenseEndDate

checkConstraints.name: CK_WebhookDelivery_PayloadSource
checkConstraints.expression: RequestBodyJson IS NOT NULL OR PayloadHash IS NOT NULL

checkConstraints.name: CK_WebhookDelivery_ResponseTiming
checkConstraints.expression: SentAt IS NULL OR ResponseReceivedAt IS NULL OR SentAt <= ResponseReceivedAt

checkConstraints.name: CK_AIInteractionLog_Confidence
checkConstraints.expression: Confidence IS NULL OR (Confidence >= 0 AND Confidence <= 1)

checkConstraints.name: CK_TrainingPermissionRecord_Dates
checkConstraints.expression: EffectiveTo IS NULL OR EffectiveFrom <= EffectiveTo

checkConstraints.name: CK_RiskRegisterMonitorEvent_ProcessedAt
checkConstraints.expression: ProcessedAt IS NULL OR CreatedAt <= ProcessedAt

checkConstraints.name: CK_AuditExportRequest_DateRange
checkConstraints.expression: FromDateTime IS NULL OR ToDateTime IS NULL OR FromDateTime <= ToDateTime

checkConstraints.name: CK_ProjectIntakeRecord_ClimateZoneCode
checkConstraints.expression: ClimateZoneCode IS NULL OR ClimateZoneCode IN ('IN-Composite','IN-HotDry','IN-WarmHumid','IN-Temperate','IN-Cold')

checkConstraints.name: CK_ProjectIntakeRecord_ImportSourceType
checkConstraints.expression: ImportSourceType IS NULL OR ImportSourceType IN ('manual','import')

checkConstraints.name: CK_ProjectIntakeRecord_Dates
checkConstraints.expression: PlannedStartDate IS NULL OR PlannedEndDate IS NULL OR PlannedStartDate <= PlannedEndDate

checkConstraints.name: CK_LicenseSeatAssignment_ReturnedAt
checkConstraints.expression: CheckedOutAt IS NULL OR ReturnedAt IS NULL OR CheckedOutAt <= ReturnedAt

checkConstraints.name: CK_WeatherFileCache_UnitSystem
checkConstraints.expression: UnitSystem IS NULL OR UnitSystem IN ('SI','Imperial')

checkConstraints.name: CK_WeatherFileCache_ClimateZoneCode
checkConstraints.expression: ClimateZoneCode IS NULL OR ClimateZoneCode IN ('IN-Composite','IN-HotDry','IN-WarmHumid','IN-Temperate','IN-Cold')

checkConstraints.name: CK_WeatherFileCache_ChecksumHex
checkConstraints.expression: ChecksumSha256 IS NULL OR ChecksumSha256 NOT LIKE '%[^0-9A-Fa-f]%'

checkConstraints.name: CK_OnPremConnectorTransfer_Timing
checkConstraints.expression: StartedAt IS NULL OR CompletedAt IS NULL OR StartedAt <= CompletedAt

notes: All tenant-scoped mutable tables include TenantId, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, Version, and Etag where required by MLD contracts.
JSON contract arrays are normalized into child tables where cardinality/searching matters; JSON columns are retained for flexible payloads explicitly modeled as object/array in MLD.
AuditLog and AIInteractionLog are modeled append-only; application and DDL governance must prohibit normal UI deletion.
Artifact search performance in FRD/MLD is primarily supported by Elasticsearch; SQL indexes support transactional and operational queries only.
SQL Server-specific choices assume SQL Server 2022 Standard with datetime2(3), uniqueidentifier PKs, computed-check enforcement where feasible, and JSON validation via ISJSON.
A shared control-plane seed tenant identifier is used in seedData only to represent seeded system templates/config; tenant-specific provisioning should copy or adapt these records.

Package naming rule is constrained to supported package versions 1.0, 1.1, and 2.0; actual file name assembly should be enforced in application and packaging service using ProjectCode_CreditID_DocType_vX.Y.ext.
Budget variance fields are modeled as persisted business values with consistency check expressions; implementation may alternatively use computed persisted columns if preferred.
IoTMeasurement uses bigint identity clustered primary key for high-ingest time-series efficiency while preserving unique stream/timestamp constraint.
SourceCitation is polymorphic by owner entity to avoid sparse per-module citation tables while retaining citation traceability.
BusinessCalendar now supports tenant defaults and project-level override through scope fields while retaining holiday normalization.
Notification settings and rules were expanded to align with MLD notification preferences, quiet-hours behavior, and event-code driven routing.
AIInteractionLog includes cross-border processing allowance tracking to reflect FRD-compliant external LLM invocation via the India-hosted gateway.
